items.docs: Submits a request to generate a report. Reports are processed asynchronously. A successful response returns a report ID that can be used to check the status and retrieve the download link. A webhook notification is sent when the report is ready.

params.name: report_id
params.description: The unique identifier for the report, returned when the report request was created.

items.docs: Retrieves the status and download link for a previously requested report. When the report generation is complete, the status will be SUCCEEDED and a download link will be provided. The download link is temporary and should be used promptly.
